# RFC_NNN: [Proposal Title]

<!-- An RFC (Request for Comments) is a proposal for a decision not yet made. Write it BEFORE implementing. Think it through here. Then either: - It gets accepted → becomes an ADR - It gets rejected → stays here as a record of what was considered and why RFCs are thinking tools. They don't need to be polished. They need to be honest about trade-offs. -->
